column2: Verify System Fails to Manage Risks Near Industrial Sites
column3: ['The user selects the location of the planned operation, which is near an industrial site. ', 'The user intentionally skips the risk assessment and risk management steps for the planned operation. ', 'Upon submitting the planned operation, the system does not flag any potential risks or provide recommendations for mitigation. ']
column4: ['Location of the planned operation is identified as being near an industrial site. ', 'Risk assessment and mitigation steps are not performed for the planned operation. ', 'The system fails to identify and manage risks associated with operations near industrial sites. ']
